description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular layout. The structure features large glass panels along the main facade, likely providing ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. A spacious swimming pool is integrated into the front patio area, with a secondary, smaller pool or water feature at the rear. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, with a prominent overhanging roof section and a shaded patio or carport on one side. The building sits on a broad, flat platform, suggesting a strong emphasis on outdoor living and open space. The overall design is sleek, geometric, and emphasizes horizontal lines typical of contemporary architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with expansive glass panels, a large front pool, and a minimalist, rectangular design on a broad platform.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main building, large pool, and shaded patio area.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the pool and the overhanging roof structure.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the secondary pool or water feature and the elongated main building.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool and the open patio area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large glass panels along the main facade
